svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="gwyfPVto3OYyjQZAuqhD"> <mxGraphModel dx="872" dy="473" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="none" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml MovieTicketBooking_SequenceDiagram_WRITE

' ===== STYLE =====
skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 2
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderColor #2E7D32
skinparam sequenceParticipantBackgroundColor #E8F5E9
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBorderColor #2E7D32
skinparam noteBorderColor #D32F2F
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFEBEE

title WRITE Scenario: Create Booking with Seat Reservation

actor Client as C
participant \"BookingController\" as BC
participant \"BookingService\" as BS
participant \"UserRepository\" as UR
participant \"ShowRepository\" as SR
participant \"ShowSeatRepository\" as SSR
participant \"BookingRepository\" as BR
database \"Database\" as DB

C -> BC : POST /api/v1/bookings\n{\"userId\":1, \"showId\":1, \"seatIds\":[1,2,3]}
activate BC

BC -> BS : createBooking(BookingRequestDTO)
activate BS

note right of BS #FFEBEE : Validate Request\n- Check seat count <= 10\n- No duplicate seats

BS -> UR : findById(userId)
activate UR
UR -> DB : SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?
DB --> UR : User
UR --> BS : User
deactivate UR

BS -> SR : findById(showId)
activate SR
SR -> DB : SELECT * FROM shows WHERE id = ?
DB --> SR : Show
SR --> BS : Show
deactivate SR

note right of BS #FFEBEE : Validate Show\n- Is active?\n- Not started yet?

BS -> BR : hasExistingPendingBooking(userId, showId)
activate BR
BR -> DB : SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings\nWHERE user_id=? AND show_id=? AND status='PENDING'
DB --> BR : count
BR --> BS : false
deactivate BR

group Transaction [SERIALIZABLE Isolation]

 BS -> SSR : findByIdInAndShowIdWithLock(seatIds, showId)
 activate SSR
 note right of SSR #FFCDD2 : **PESSIMISTIC_WRITE LOCK**\nPrevents concurrent booking
 SSR -> DB : SELECT * FROM show_seats\nWHERE id IN (?) AND show_id = ?\n**FOR UPDATE**
 DB --> SSR : List<ShowSeat>
 SSR --> BS : List<ShowSeat> (locked)
 deactivate SSR

 note right of BS #FFEBEE : Validate all seats\nstatus = AVAILABLE

 note right of BS #E8F5E9 : Calculate Pricing\n- Base price × category multiplier\n- Apply coupon discount

 note right of BS #E8F5E9 : Generate Booking Number\nBK-YYYYMMDD-XXXXX

 BS -> BR : save(Booking)
 activate BR
 BR -> DB : INSERT INTO bookings (...)
 DB --> BR : Booking (id=1)
 BR --> BS : Booking
 deactivate BR

 BS -> SSR : saveAll(showSeats) [status=BLOCKED]
 activate SSR
 SSR -> DB : UPDATE show_seats SET status='BLOCKED',\nbooking_id=? WHERE id IN (?)
 DB --> SSR : Updated
 SSR --> BS : List<ShowSeat>
 deactivate SSR

end

BS --> BC : BookingResponseDTO
deactivate BS

BC --> C : 201 CREATED\n{\n \"bookingNumber\": \"BK-20260329-A1B2C\",\n \"status\": \"PENDING\",\n \"seatNumbers\": [\"A-1\",\"A-2\",\"A-3\"],\n \"totalAmount\": 750.00,\n \"finalAmount\": 650.00\n}
deactivate BC

@enduml

",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="6vH42XDeX_oHI80BPV8k-9"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1522" width="1508" x="140" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
